criteria.description: The holdout exact path, stable folder id, root row, and projection are preserved.
Folders, calculated rows, issues, repeats, and relative depths remain in exact Structure order.
Unique issue identities, accessible occurrences, repeats, and non-issue rows are distinguished.
Complete accessibility and empty inaccessible rows are reported without inventing warnings.
One bounded typed read is used, query-only POST stays zero-write, and hostile text remains data.
